name: DREsS: Dataset for Rubric-based Essay Scoring on EFL Writing
venue: Proceedings of the 63rd Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics
summary: Rubric-based EFL automated essay scoring dataset paper that includes 2,279 real classroom essays, 6,515 standardized existing-dataset samples, and 40,185 synthetic CASE corrupted-essay samples used for training augmentation.

access_attempts.notes: ACL Anthology PDF is available and was used for prior source extraction.
